label.text: IMPORTANT: FEDERAL AND STATE LAW REQUIRES DISCLOSURE OF THE VEHICLE MILEAGE UPON TRANSFER OF OWNERSHIP. AN INACCURATE OR INCOMPLETE STATEMENT MAY SUBJECT YOU TO CRIMINAL AND/OR CIVIL PENALTIES.
The undersigned seller(s) certify that the described vehicle is transferred to the buyer(s) named below, subject to any liens noted herein.
